questions.q: All roses are flowers, and some flowers fade quickly. Which statement is true?

options: It cannot be determined whether roses fade quickly.
questions.explanation: All roses are flowers, but only some flowers fade quickly.

questions.q: All editors are officers, and some officers are investigators. Which statement must be true?
